frameworks.name: active inference
frameworks.one_line: epistemic behaviour as inference over hierarchical generative models

frameworks.name: hierarchical generative models
frameworks.one_line: deep generative models with nested temporal structure across timescales

core_question: How can deep temporal generative models within active inference account for epistemic behaviour such as reading?
key_assumptions: behaviour can be cast as inference over a generative model
generative models are hierarchical with nested timescales
manipulations: depth of temporal hierarchy in the generative model
key_findings: deep temporal models support simulation of reading via active inference
nested temporal structure emerges from hierarchical state transitions
simulations exhibit features of biological plausibility
interpretations: active inference with deep temporal models offers a principled account of epistemic behaviour
deep hierarchical models can plausibly map onto neural processing of sequential structure
